mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.role_name AS name, r.role_description AS description, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_roles ur WHERE ur.role_id = r.id AND (ur.effective_to IS NULL OR ur.effective_to > NOW())) AS userCount FROM roles r WHERE r.role_status = 'active' ORDER BY r.id

SELECT r.id, r.role_name AS name, r.role_description AS description, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_roles ur WHERE ur.role_id = r.id AND (ur.effective_to IS NULL OR ur.effective_to > NOW())) AS userCount FROM roles r WHERE r.id = #{id}
